components.name: Design Tokens
components.description: The tiered token graph — brand-agnostic CORE (primitive raw values, semantic intent aliases, the 4px interactive radius) and the C2 DOMAIN threat accents. Authored in tokens/core.json + tokens/c2-domain.json (DTCG), generated into src/styles/tokens.generated.css (CSS vars) and src/primitives/tokens.generated.ts (typed). Theme by swapping CORE primitives; CORE never references domain values.

components.name: Conventions
components.description: The design-system governance rules as data — no raw hex, central icons only, the 4px interactive radius, RTL containers, oklch status colors, useCardSlots composition. Authored in governance/rules.json and enforced by `pnpm design:check` (drift guard + design-lint ratchet + eslint). Humans read them here; agents read the same source in public/DESIGN_CONTEXT.md.

components.name: Motion
components.description: The three-spring motion system — fast/moderate/slow with one-tier-faster exits. All timing lives in @/lib/springs (framer-motion tokens) and is mirrored as --motion-* CSS vars + .overlay-motion-* helpers for Radix overlays. Slow in, faster out: every exit runs a tier quicker and drops the bounce.

components.name: Scrolling List
components.description: The scrolling-list edge-cue system. useScrollEdges observes a scroller and reports which edges have more content; ScrollEdgeCue renders a surface-aware gradient + chevron at those edges; ScrollArea composes both with a restyled overlay scrollbar and a native fallback on touch. Signals overflow so a clipped list never looks finished.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Compact label for status, counts, and metadata. Six variants on the C2 dark surface — translucent fills and layered rings, no hard borders. The single home for all status/indicator chips and dots: StatusChip, HealthStatus (StatusDot/HealthBadge), ActivityTimestampChip, and NewUpdatesPill are variants of this one Badge concept and are documented here.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: White ring when the badge is a focusable link.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render styling onto a child element (Radix Slot) — e.g. an anchor.

components.name: Button
components.description: The one button foundation. Its buttonVariants cva owns every surface + size treatment in the C2 design — layered white opacities, oklch destructive; src/primitives/buttonTokens.ts is only an alias map onto it. ActionButton, SplitActionButton (Button + Button size=icon + DropdownMenu), and CopyButton (ghost icon Button) are compositions that render this foundation (documented here), not separate designs; CameraToggleButton lives on the Toggle primitive.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Inset white ring for keyboard nav.

props.name: size
props.description: Height + type scale; icon is a square slot.

props.name: asChild
props.description: Render styling onto a child element (Radix Slot) for links/polymorphism.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Two-state pressed/unpressed button built on Radix Toggle — real aria-pressed + data-state=on semantics. The domain CameraToggleButton is a composition on this primitive (documented here), wearing the button family's fill tokens.

components.name: Accordion
components.description: A vertically stacked set of collapsible sections, built on Radix. Each item animates its height open and closed; type single/multiple controls how many can be open. The card-internal AccordionSection (the TargetCard section grammar composed by CardDetails, CardIdentity, and CardLog) is documented here as the domain variant.

states.label: Open
states.note: Body expands with the accordion-down height animation; chevron rotates 180deg.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

states.label: Disabled
states.note: 50% opacity, pointer-events none on the item trigger.

props.name: type
props.description: Single allows one open item; multiple allows many.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Single-type only: lets the open item close again.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open item(s). Array when type is multiple.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when the open item(s) change.

props.name: disabled
props.description: On AccordionItem: makes the item non-interactive.

props.name: className
props.description: Class overrides merged via cn(). Available on every part.

components.name: Input
components.description: Single-line text field on the C2 dark surface — translucent input-background fill, layered focus ring, selection styled via tokens. The base of every search / form field.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Ring + border brighten for keyboard/caret focus.

states.label: Invalid
states.note: aria-invalid ring/border in the destructive tone.

props.name: type
props.description: Native input type (text, search, number, password…).

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field sharing Input's surface grammar — translucent fill, focus ring, min-height with free vertical resize.

components.name: Select
components.description: Radix-based dropdown picker: trigger reads like an Input, the popover panel floats on the overlay surface with check-marked items and scroll cues.

states.label: Open
states.note: Panel floats with the overlay motion; trigger keeps focus.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

states.label: Disabled
states.note: 50% opacity trigger; items can disable individually.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the whole control (root) or one item.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Radix checkbox with checked / unchecked / indeterminate states — accent fill when checked, layered ring when idle. Pair with a label for the hit target.

states.label: Checked
states.note: Accent fill + check glyph; aria-checked true.

states.label: Indeterminate
states.note: Dash glyph for partial group selection.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Radix on/off switch — a sliding thumb on a tinted track, accent fill when checked. For immediate-effect settings (arm, mute, auto-track), not form submission.

states.label: On
states.note: Accent track, thumb slides to inline-end; aria-checked true.

components.name: Slider
components.description: Radix range slider — tinted track, accent range fill, and a grabbable thumb with a focus ring. Single- or multi-thumb; used for zoom, volume, and threshold controls.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value(s) — one entry per thumb.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Radix tabs — a muted list rail with an active-surface trigger and swappable panels. Arrow keys move between triggers; content mounts per tab.

states.label: Active
states.note: Trigger lifts onto the active surface; aria-selected true.

states.label: Inactive
states.note: Muted text on the list rail.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: Ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when the active tab changes.

props.name: disabled
props.description: On TabsTrigger: makes one tab non-interactive.

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Radix modal dialog — dimmed backdrop, centered overlay-surface panel with the overlay motion, focus trapped inside until dismissed. For confirmations and focused edit tasks.

states.label: Open
states.note: Backdrop dims the app; panel scales in with the overlay motion; focus is trapped.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Fires on open/close (Esc, backdrop, close button).

components.name: Popover
components.description: Radix anchored popover — a floating overlay-surface panel positioned against its trigger, dismissed by outside click or Esc. Non-modal: the app stays interactive behind it.

props.name: align
props.description: On PopoverContent: alignment along the side.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.description: Radix action menu anchored to a trigger — items, checkbox/radio items, separators, and submenus on the overlay surface. Powers overflow (⋯) and split-button menus.

states.label: Open
states.note: Panel floats with the overlay motion; arrow keys walk items.

states.label: Destructive item
states.note: variant="destructive" items read in the danger tone.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: On DropdownMenuItem: fires when the item is chosen.

props.name: variant
props.description: On DropdownMenuItem: danger tone for irreversible actions.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Radix hover/focus tooltip — a small inverted-surface label with an arrow, delayed in and instant between siblings. Requires the app-level TooltipProvider (already mounted).

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: On TooltipContent: gap from the trigger.

components.name: Toasts (sonner)
components.description: App-wide toast queue via sonner. The vendored Toaster wears the C2 surface (surface-3 fill, layered ring, 2px radius), follows the live text direction, and stacks top-center. Fire with toast() / toast.success() / toast.error().

components.name: TelemetryRow
components.description: Single telemetry metric: icon, label, monospace value. Laid out in a 3-column grid that wraps by item count.

components.name: CardHeader
components.description: Top row of a TargetCard — icon, title, subtitle, status chip, badge, and chevron.

components.name: CardActions
components.description: Action bar for a TargetCard. Composes Button presets (ActionButton, SplitActionButton), the Toggle-based CameraToggleButton, and the confirm pattern.

components.name: CardDetails
components.description: Collapsible telemetry accordion. Composes AccordionSection and TelemetryRow in a fixed grid.

components.name: CardSensors
components.description: Lists detecting sensors for a target with type, distance, and timestamp.

components.name: CardMedia
components.description: Image or video slot for a target surveillance feed. Supports live badge, playback, and lightbox.

components.name: CardLog
components.description: Chronological event log accordion with newest-first ordering and expand-all.

components.name: CardClosure
components.description: Outcome selection grid for closing a detection event.

components.name: CardIdentity
components.description: Identity rows (name, model, serial) in a collapsible 2-col grid matching CardDetails, with a per-row hover-revealed CopyButton riding a gradient fade so long IDs dissolve cleanly under the icon.

components.name: CardTimeline
components.description: Engagement progress steps — pending / active / complete / error — as a vertical checklist or a compact dot strip for collapsed headers.

components.name: CardFooterDock
components.description: Recessed action dock pinned to a TargetCard's bottom edge — equal-width quiet buttons on an inset-shadow strip, for secondary whole-card actions.

components.name: TargetCard
components.description: The core card shell. Composes CardHeader with slot children via the useCardSlots hook. The single most important block in the system.

states.label: Open
states.note: Header tinted, content expands with collapsible animation.

states.label: Focus-visible
states.note: White ring on the trigger for keyboard nav.

props.name: children
props.description: Slot content rendered inside the collapsible body.

props.name: footer
props.description: Optional footer rendered below the body.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Fires when the header is toggled.

props.name: severity
props.description: Unified urgency tier (API compat; no spine rendered).

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fires on open transition for selection sync.

components.name: FilterBar
components.description: Search input plus data-driven filter dropdowns. Pass any number of filter dimensions as a FilterDef[].

components.name: Device Card
components.description: One collapsible row per field asset, registry-driven. Health tile, primary cluster, footer actions, and overflow.

components.name: DevicesPanel
components.description: Right-hand sidebar listing connected field devices grouped by type, with search and type-filter isolation.

components.name: MapMarker
components.description: Composable tactical marker: layered surface, ring, glyph, glow, and overlays, driven by resolveMarkerStyle().

components.name: MapIcons
components.description: First-party tactical glyphs — drone, missile, car, tank, truck, human, unknown, jam wave. Each ships in two forms: the map variant (color prop + black legibility stroke for imagery) and the *CardIcon variant (stroke-free, rides currentColor for in-UI tiles).

props.name: size
props.description: Pixel size. Map variants default to 32, card variants to 15.

props.name: color
props.description: Map variants only: glyph fill (severity- or affiliation-driven). Card variants ride currentColor.
